lede: A look at April 4 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Lil Mabu and Ricardo Vilar, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Impeachment of Yoon Suk Yeol
events.desc: The impeachment of President Yoon Suk Yeol of South Korea in response to his declaration of martial law is unanimously upheld by the country's Constitutional Court, ending his presidency.

events.title: 2013 Thane building collapse
events.desc: Seventy-four people are killed in a building collapse in Thane, India.

events.title: Georgian Airways Flight 834
events.desc: Georgian Airways Flight 834 crashes at N'djili Airport in Kinshasa, killing 32.

events.title: Flag of Hong Kong
events.desc: The current flag of Hong Kong is adopted for post-colonial Hong Kong during the Third Session of the Seventh National People's Congress.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: A United States Air Force Lockheed C-5A Galaxy transporting orphans, crashes near Saigon, South Vietnam shortly after takeoff, killing 172 people.

events.title: Lockheed C-141 Starlifter
events.desc: A Lockheed C-141 Starlifter, dubbed the Hanoi Taxi, makes the last flight of Operation Homecoming.

events.title: 1905 Kangra earthquake
events.desc: In India, an earthquake hits the Kangra Valley, killing 20,000, and destroying most buildings in Kangra, McLeod Ganj and Dharamshala.

events.title: William Henry Harrison
events.desc: William Henry Harrison dies of pneumonia, becoming the first President of the United States to die in office, and setting the record for the briefest administration. Vice President John Tyler succeeds Harrison as President.

events.title: Napoleon
events.desc: Napoleon abdicates (conditionally) for the first time and names his son Napoleon II as Emperor of the French, followed by unconditional abdication two days later.

events.title: Roman consul
events.desc: Roman consul Agrippa Menenius Lanatus celebrates a triumph for a military victory over the Sabines.

births.name: Joyce Giraud
births.line: Puerto Rican television actress and producer, Miss Puerto Rico 1994

births.name: Walter Conrad Arensberg
births.line: American art collector, critic and poet (died 1954)

deaths.text: Manoj Kumar, Indian actor, director, producer, and screenwriter
Roberto Rexach Benítez, Puerto Rican academic and politician, 10th President of the Senate of Puerto Rico
William Henry Harrison, American general and politician, 9th President of the United States

observances.text: Christian feast day: Martin Luther King Jr. (Episcopal Church (USA))
Christian feast day: Reginald Heber (Anglican Church of Canada)
